notes: Corrects the Option 1 visual pass against the approved Modern Earthy mockup rather than only chasing individual bugs.
Adds non-tiling full-surface page, sidebar, panel, card, and paper textures tuned to the warm dark brown and muted olive palette.
Forces dark vertical home cards, calmer typography, subtler stat tiles, warm line icons, and a compact icon-search control to stop the page from reading like a light admin dashboard.
